kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${body} = {'name': 'Andre', 'username': 'qaautomation'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users path_url=/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '45', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Andre", "username": "qaautomation"}'

C:\repositorio\qa-automation-framework\venv\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'jsonplaceholder.typicode.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
${response} = <Response [201]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\repositorio\\qa-automation-framework\\reports\\browser\\traces\\temp\\22c9329c-1ce4-4363-812c-339a7fd07377"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\repositorio\\qa-automation-framework\\reports\\browser\\traces\\temp\\22c9329c-1ce4-4363-812c-339a7fd07377"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'standard_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=login-button'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '.shopping_cart_link'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=checkout'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Andre' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text '12345' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=continue'.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=finish'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Thank you for your order! at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
